wikipedia-omit:Xiaoyoukeng.notes: Xiaoyoukeng is a geothermal and volcanic landscape feature within Yangmingshan National Park. While it has articles in other Wikipedia language editions, the English Wikipedia article is sparse and only covers the park as a whole rather than this specific feature independently.
